sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Official compilation snapshot current with amendments included in the source file; live amendment status should be treated as review-only unless separately confirmed.

observedSectionWindows.note: Procedures, reporting requirements, and closing boundary.

boundaries: Keep Regulation 141 focused on the commutation-of-reinsurance-agreements regulation only.
Keep AG 55 and the other actuarial-guideline files out of this wave.
Preserve page locators and line references where available because this is a text-based PDF source.
Keep the closing reporting window separate so the end of the source remains reviewable.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No AG files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Opening title, purpose, and applicability
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep the official-compilation header and the purpose/applicability text together and stop before definitions begin.

topicMap.label: Definitions, general provisions, and requirements
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep the definitions and general provisions together as a narrow review-only slice and stop before procedures begins.

topicMap.label: Procedures and reporting closeout
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep the procedures and reporting material together and stop at the end of the source.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 141 opening title, purpose, and applicability slice

paragraphTarget.notes: Capture the title page, purpose, and applicability guidance as one narrow review-only slice.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the title page, purpose, and applicability guidance as one narrow review-only slice.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 141 definitions, general provisions, and requirements slice

paragraphTarget.notes: Capture the definitions, general provisions, and requirement language before the procedures section begins.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the definitions, general provisions, and requirement language before the procedures section begins.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 141 procedures and reporting closeout slice

paragraphTarget.notes: Capture the procedures and reporting requirements as the final narrow review-only slice and keep the closing boundary explicit.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the procedures and reporting requirements as the final narrow review-only slice and keep the closing boundary explicit.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat the purpose, applicability, requirements, and reporting instructions as regulatory text when they direct what the company must do.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat commutation, insurer, obligations, and plan terms as terminology when the text explains rather than directs.
reviewStandards.reinsurance: Treat commutation-of-reinsurance-agreements references as reinsurance content when they appear.
reviewStandards.reportingRequirement: Treat submission and reporting instructions as reporting requirements if they appear.
reviewStandards.documentationExpectation: Treat supporting-text instructions as documentation expectations if they appear.
reviewStandards.governanceOrControlExpectation: Treat superintendent-approval and objection language as governance or control expectations if they appear.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to Insurance Law, article 7, impairment, insolvency, and other statutory provisions as cross-reference context unless operationalized.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title page and section labels as background unless they impose a requirement.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat each page window as review-only and do not widen it unless later cleanup explicitly needs that split.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the commutation approval process and any dense legal language as requiring human review unless the source text is explicit.

currentChecksNeeded: Plan file exists and parses as JSON.
The Regulation 141 plan markdown must exist and carry the expected headings.
Every planned batch must remain review-only by default.
The source posture must stay explicitly active, with the official-compilation snapshot noted.
Each planned batch must have a matching batch definition.
The Regulation 141 batch definition file must stay synchronized with the plan.
Page locators and line references should remain visible in the review packet.
futureChecksSuggested: Keep the plan portable if later NY-regulation amendments need to be split into a companion wave.
Keep the review-only guardrails visible until the review index and self-review note are created.

operatingNote.citationGuidance: Page locators are the primary anchor and line references are expected.
operatingNote.boundaryGuidance: The official-compilation snapshot should remain visible as a review-only caveat rather than a promotion signal.
operatingNote.appendixGuidance: Keep the procedures and reporting closeout separate so the source ends at a visible boundary.
